name: Sri M's Kriya Yoga
access: Initiation-based, taught in person in small groups; no dedicated practice app.
evidenceStatus: Minimal to no peer-reviewed research specific to this method. Listed for tradition and access information only; no clinical claims are made.
whyNotFeatured: Not app-deliverable and lacks a statable published evidence base.

name: Kriya Yoga (Yogananda / Self-Realization Fellowship and related lineages)
tradition: Kriya lineages of Lahiri Mahasaya and Paramahansa Yogananda
access: Initiation-based pranayama-meditation transmitted by lineage teachers; not app-deliverable.
evidenceStatus: Minimal peer-reviewed research on the specific technique.
whyNotFeatured: Not app-deliverable and minimal published evidence.

name: Sudarshan Kriya Yoga (SKY)
tradition: Art of Living (Sri Sri Ravi Shankar)
access: Cyclical rhythmic-breathing practice taught through a structured in-person or live course, not a solo app.
evidenceStatus: A relatively fair evidence base for a breath practice, with a real if quality-limited randomized and pilot base for depression and anxiety. Many studies are conducted by affiliated researchers and are small.
whyNotFeatured: Course-delivered rather than self-guided via a dedicated app, so it sits outside the featured, app-based scope.

name: Vipassana (S.N. Goenka format)
access: Ten-day silent residential retreat, donation-based; not app-deliverable.
evidenceStatus: Evidence is thin relative to its cultural prominence, dominated by small or naturalistic studies, with adverse-event under-reporting a specific concern for intensive retreats.
